nodes.label: .`when switchProvider is called, it delegates to repository`()
.`initial state has empty categories and is loading`()
.`selectCategory sets selected category and triggers loading`()
.`recent live history becomes a virtual recent category`()
.`recent category stays visible in live tv even when history is empty`()
.`last visited live category is exposed for quick return`()
.`selecting a live category remembers it for the current provider`()
.`selecting recent does not overwrite remembered live group`()
.`channel search delegates to repository for provider categories`()
.`hidden numbering mode keeps displayed channel numbers non-negative`()
